title: ZXPong Tips & Strategy
description: Improve your ZXPong skills with practical advice for longer rallies, better paddle control, and higher scores.
summary: Small improvements in positioning, timing, and reactions can make a big difference in every ZXPong match.

sections.heading: Master the Basics
paragraphs: Strong paddle control is the foundation of every successful match. Smooth, controlled movement will help you return more shots and stay in every rally.
Try to avoid rushing across the court. Small adjustments are usually more effective than sudden movements.

sections.heading: Build Longer Rallies
paragraphs: Long rallies are one of the best ways to improve your reactions, positioning, and timing.
Focus on keeping the ball in play rather than forcing difficult returns. Consistent play will naturally lead to higher scores and better leaderboard positions.
bullets: Watch the ball carefully before moving.
Return to the centre after every shot.
Increase the AI difficulty as your confidence grows.

sections.heading: Play with a Goal
paragraphs: Every match is an opportunity to unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, or beat your previous longest rally.
Setting yourself a simple goal before each session helps keep every game rewarding while you continue improving your skills.

images.caption: Small improvements lead to longer rallies and better results.

featureShowcases.heading: Play Smarter, Rally Longer
featureShowcases.summary: Simple improvements in positioning and timing can dramatically improve your performance.
body: ZXPong rewards patience, quick reactions, and consistent paddle control. Learning when to move, where to position yourself, and how to return the ball safely will help you survive longer rallies and win more matches.
Whether you're practising against the AI or competing online, every match is another opportunity to improve.
bullets: Increase your confidence in Solo Play and World PVP.

image.caption: Every rally is another opportunity to improve.
